description: Frontend Audio File Test Mode - 使用预设音频文件流替代麦克风输入,测试 VAD + ASR 管道

userStories.title: Add file-based audio stream source
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an async generator that streams audio from a preset file to test the ASR pipeline without microphone input.
acceptanceCriteria: Create voicevibe/frontend/audio_file_streamer.py with AudioFileStreamer class
Load MP3 using pydub and convert to PCM int16 (16kHz, mono)
Yield audio chunks of 4096 samples (8192 bytes) each
Add configurable chunk_delay parameter (default 0.1s) to simulate real-time streaming
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add test mode toggle to voice pipeline
userStories.description: As a developer, I need _run_voice_pipeline to support both mic and file modes so I can switch for testing.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify _run_voice_pipeline signature to add audio_source parameter ('mic' | 'file', default 'mic')
When audio_source='file', use AudioFileStreamer instead of AudioRecorder
File mode skips AudioRecorder start/stop logic
Broadcaster, VAD, and ASR processing logic remains unchanged
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add hidden test trigger to frontend
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a hidden entry point to trigger file mode for quick pipeline verification.
acceptanceCriteria: In voice.js, detect double-click on FAB (two clicks within 500ms)
Double-click sends vv_start_voice_test message to backend
Show '测试模式' indicator in voice panel when test mode is active
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Wire test mode trigger to backend
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the backend to respond to test mode trigger and start the file stream pipeline.
acceptanceCriteria: Add reactive event handler for input.vv_start_voice_test
Call _run_voice_pipeline(session, audio_source='file')
Use test file: /Users/didi/Downloads/audio/en/clips/common_voice_en_42696072.mp3
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Verify end-to-end file test flow
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to verify the file test mode runs completely with VAD + ASR working together.
acceptanceCriteria: Double-click FAB triggers test mode
Voice panel opens showing '测试模式' indicator
Transcription text updates in real-time on panel
VAD detects speech/silence correctly
Panel auto-closes or shows done state after silence timeout
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
